mapper.insert: INSERT INTO auth_session_blacklist ( jti, user_id, expired_at, revoked_at, revoke_reason, created_at ) VALUES ( #{jti}, #{userId}, #{expiredAt}, COALESCE(#{revokedAt}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), #{revokeReason}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ) ON CONFLICT (jti) DO UPDATE SET user_id = EXCLUDED.user_id, expired_at = EXCLUDED.expired_at, revoked_at = EXCLUDED.revoked_at, revoke_reason = EXCLUDED.revoke_reason
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM auth_session_blacklist WHERE jti = #{jti} AND (expired_at IS NULL OR expired_at > #{now})
